_meta.purpose: BLEEDTHROUGH per-province PREFIX config: the Chinese CIDR blocks the curation step samples candidate IPs from. Feed to scripts.bleedthrough_curate, which classifies each sample into dark IPs (direct transport) and live open resolvers (fallback transport) and writes config/bleedthrough_targets.json.
_meta.warning: Every prefix below is an RFC 5737 documentation range and is NOT real. Replace `provinces` with real per-province Chinese prefixes (province code + ASN + one or more CIDRs) before curating. bleedthrough_curate refuses to run while placeholder=true.
_meta.how_to_get_prefixes: Map Chinese ASNs (e.g. AS4134 China Telecom, AS4837 China Unicom, AS4808/AS4812) to their announced prefixes via a public BGP/RIR source, and tag each with the province it serves.
_meta.sample_per_prefix: how many random host IPs to sample and classify from each CIDR.
_meta.control_domain: a benign, UNcensored domain used only to test liveness/dark-space (never a censored probe).
